curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #10585 into master. The fix moves validate_path_is_safe from mlflow/server/handlers.py to mlflow/utils/uri.py and adds a call to it in HttpArtifactRepository.list_artifacts to validate paths received from remote server responses. Three non-test source files changed (handlers.py removal, uri.py addition, http_artifact_repo.py fix), so the patch is not noisy. The actual vulnerability location is in http_artifact_repo.py where list_artifacts did not validate the path field from the JSON response, enabling path traversal that could lead to arbitrary file writes and command execution. CWE-78 was the assigned CWE; the mechanism is path traversal leading to file write and command execution.
